title: Louvre Announces Architects for Expansion That Will Include New Mona Lisa Space
summary_full: A team of French and German architects has been selected for the project, which is expected to increase the Paris museum’s capacity by three million visitors a year.
summary_public: A team of French and German architects has been selected for the project, which is expected to increase the Paris museum’s capacity by three million visitors a year.
